FORM 8-K — CURRENT REPORT

Date of Report: November 4, 2024

Item 4.02 Non-Reliance on Previously Issued Financial Statements or a Related Audit Report or Completed Interim Review.

On October 31, 2024, the Audit Committee of the Board of Directors of Globex Corporation (the "Company"), after discussion with the Company's management and BigFour LLP, the Company's independent registered public accounting firm, concluded that the Company's previously issued consolidated financial statements for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023, and for the quarterly periods ended Q1 2024 and Q2 2024, should no longer be relied upon. The non-reliance determination relates to errors in the Company's revenue recognition for certain bill-and-hold arrangements and the related deferred revenue balances.

The Company intends to file restated financial statements for the affected periods as promptly as practicable. The Audit Committee has discussed the matters disclosed in this Current Report on Form 8-K with BigFour LLP.

Item 9.01 Financial Statements and Exhibits.

(d) Exhibits — none.
